<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:川田神社 (湖南市)]]
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Expand Japanese|川田神社 (湖南市)}}

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Kawata Shrine (Q11479033)
| native_name = 川田神社 (湖南市)
| image = Konan-Kawata-shrine.jpg
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Kawata Shrine (Q11479033)
| coordinates = {{coord|35.022155|136.074532}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| deity = {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|lt=Ame-no-Koyane|en|Ame-no-Koyane|fr|Ama-no-Koyane-no-mikoto|it|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋命|mni|ꯑꯃꯦ-ꯅꯣ-ꯀꯣꯌꯅꯦ|pt|Ame-no-Koyane|ru|Амэ-но коянэ-но микото|simple|Ame-no-Koyane|zh|天兒屋命|qid=Q2564508}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Kawata Shrine'''|川田神社 (湖南市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286}}
* {{ill|Myojin Taisha|lt=Myōjin Taisha|en|Myojin Taisha|fr|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|simple|Myōjin Taisha|zh|名神大社|qid=Q9610964}}
* {{ill|Shrine receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|lt=Shrine receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|qid=Q135009132}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904}}
* {{ill|Kanpei-sha|lt=Kanpei-sha|simple|Kanpei-sha|qid=Q135160338}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181799</ref>
* {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|qid=Q135018062}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181799</ref>
** Series ordinal: 1258
* {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|ko|종5위|zh|從五位|qid=Q11071125}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181799</ref>
* {{ill|Q135206482|lt=Q135206482|qid=Q135206482}}
* {{ill|Q135206477|lt=Q135206477|qid=Q135206477}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province|ja|近江国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11638477}}
** Series ordinal: 19
** P155: {{ill|Ishihenokashiki- Shrine|lt=Ishihenokashiki- Shrine|qid=Q135039795}}
** P156: {{ill|Ihimichino Shrine|lt=Ihimichino Shrine|qid=Q135039797}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Konan, Shiga|lt=Konan|ar|كونان (شيغا)|azb|کونان، شیقا|ceb|Konan-shi (distrito sa Hapon)|ce|Конан (Сига)|de|Konan|en|Konan, Shiga|es|Konan (Shiga)|fa|کونان، شیگا|fi|Konan (Shiga)|fr|Konan (Shiga)|gl|Konan|hak|Konan-sṳ|hy|Կոնան (Սիգա)|id|Konan, Shiga|it|Konan (Giappone)|ja|湖南市|ko|고난시 (시가현)|mzn|کونان، شیگا|nl|Konan (Shiga)|pl|Konan|pt|Konan (Shiga)|ro|Konan, Shiga|ru|Конан (Сига)|sv|Konan, Shiga|tg|Конан, Шига|tl|Konan, Shiga|tr|Konan, Shiga|tt|Конан (Сига)|uk|Конан (Сіґа)|vi|Konan, Shiga|war|Konan, Shiga|zh-classical|湖南市|zh_min_nan|Konan-chhī|zh_yue|湖南市|zh|湖南市|qid=Q857194}}
* {{ill|Ōmi Province|lt=Ōmi Province|ca|Província d'Ōmi|ckb|پارێزگای ئۆمی|cs|Provincie Ómi|de|Provinz Ōmi|en|Ōmi Province|es|Provincia de Ōmi|fa|ولایت اومی|fi|Ōmin provinssi|fr|Province d'Ōmi|gl|Provincia de Ōmi|hak|Ōmi-koet|id|Provinsi Ōmi|it|Ōmi|ja|近江国|ko|오미국|lt|Omio žemė|nl|Omi (provincie)|pl|Prowincja Ōmi|pt|Província de Ōmi|ru|Оми (провинция)|simple|Ōmi Province|sk|Ómi (provincia)|sr|Провинција Оми|tr|Ōmi (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Омі|vi|Tỉnh Ōmi|zh_min_nan|Ômi-kok|zh_yue|近江國|zh|近江國|qid=Q843882}}
* {{ill|Kōka District, Shiga|lt=Kōka district|en|Kōka District, Shiga|fa|بخش کوکا، شیگا|ja|甲賀郡|ru|Кока (уезд)|tr|Kōka İlçesi, Shiga|zh|甲賀郡|qid=Q4227244}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|35.022155|136.074532}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181799</ref>

== image (P18) ==

* Konan-Kawata-shrine.jpg

== described by source (P1343) ==

* {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|qid=Q135037878}}
** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20060723061552/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/210703.html

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 181799
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299}}

== modern shrine ranking (P13723) ==

* {{ill|Son-sha|lt=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}

== architectural style (P149) ==

* {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|lt=nagare-zukuri|en|Nagare-zukuri|fr|Nagare-zukuri|it|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|pl|Nagare-zukuri|ru|Нагарэ-дзукури|sv|Nagare-zukuri|zh|流造|qid=Q210684}}

== Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) ==

* 7160005002580

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Kahatano Shrine|lt=Kahatano Shrine|qid=Q135039796}}
* {{ill|Kahatano Shrine|lt=Kahatano Shrine|qid=Q135039796}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181799</ref>
** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904}}

==References==

[[Category:Shikinaisha]]
[[Category:Myōjin Taisha]]
[[Category:Shrine receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]]
[[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]]
[[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]]
[[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]]
[[JA:川田神社 (湖南市)]]

{{wikidata link|Q11479033}}
[[Category:Myōjin Taisha]]
[[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]]
[[Category:Shrine receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]]
[[Category:Kanpei-sha]]

{{translated page|ja|川田神社 (湖南市)|version=107296880|comment=Imported full ja history}}
== Japanese Wikipedia content ==
{{出典の明記|date=2016年7月16日 (土) 07:40 (UTC)}}
{{神社
|名称   = 川田神社
|画像   = [[File:Konan-Kawata-shrine.jpg|270px]]<br />鳥居
|所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|湖南市|Q857194}}正福寺1219
|位置   = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|01|20.4|N|136|04|28.5|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} 
|祭神   = {{jalink|天児屋根命}}
|社格   = {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）論社<br/>旧{{jalink|村社}}
|創建   = 不詳
|本殿   = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}}
|別名   = 
|札所等 = 
|例祭   = {{jalink|5月1日|Q2544}}
|神事   = 
|地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=川田神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}}
}}
'''川田神社'''（かわたじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|湖南市|Q857194}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|式内社論社}}で{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社}}。

== 祭神 ==
{{jalink|天児屋根命}}を祀る。

== 歴史 ==
創祀年代不詳。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記載の{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}の論社である。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}9年（{{jalink|1876年|Q7766}}）10月に村社に列した。

== 神紋 ==
*三ッ巴

== 祭事 ==
* 例祭 - 5月1日

== 脚注 ==
{{脚注ヘルプ}}
{{Reflist}}

== 外部リンク ==
*[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=535 川田神社]（滋賀県神社庁）
{{神道 横}}

{{Shinto-stub}}

==End Japanese==
[[Category:滋賀県の神社]]
[[Category:名神大社]]
[[Category:近江国の式内社|名かわたしんしやこなんし]]
[[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]]
[[Category:湖南市の歴史]]
[[Category:湖南市の建築物]][[Category:Need translation]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
[[Category:Pages with 50+ untranslated japanese characters]]
